CancelCapacityTask.description: Grants permission to cancel a capacity task

CancelOrder.description: Grants permission to cancel an order

CreateOrder.description: Grants permission to create an order

CreateOutpost.description: Grants permission to create an Outpost

CreatePrivateConnectivityConfig.description: Grants permission to create a private connectivity configuration

CreateSite.description: Grants permission to create a site

DeleteOutpost.description: Grants permission to delete an Outpost

DeleteSite.description: Grants permission to delete a site

GetCapacityTask.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified capacity task

GetCatalogItem.description: Grants permission to get a catalog item

GetConnection.description: Grants permission to get information about the connection for your Outpost server

GetOrder.description: Grants permission to get information about an order

GetOutpost.description: Grants permission to get information about the specified Outpost

GetOutpostBillingInformation.description: Grants permission to get Outpost billing information for the specified Outpost

GetOutpostInstanceTypes.description: Grants permission to get the instance types for the specified Outpost

GetOutpostSupportedInstanceTypes.description: Grants permission to get the supported instance types for the specified Outpost

GetPrivateConnectivityConfig.description: Grants permission to get a private connectivity configuration

GetSite.description: Grants permission to get a site

GetSiteAddress.description: Grants permission to get a site address

ListAssetInstances.description: Grants permission to list all running instances for the specified Outpost

ListAssets.description: Grants permission to list the assets for your Outpost

ListBlockingInstancesForCapacityTask.description: Grants permission to list all running instances that are blocking the capacity task from running for the specified Outpost

ListCapacityTasks.description: Grants permission to list the capacity tasks for your AWS account

ListCatalogItems.description: Grants permission to list all catalog items

ListOrders.description: Grants permission to list the orders for your AWS account

ListOutposts.description: Grants permission to list the Outposts for your AWS account

ListSites.description: Grants permission to list the sites for your AWS account

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

StartCapacityTask.description: Grants permission to create a capacity task

StartConnection.description: Grants permission to start a connection for your Outpost server

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateOutpost.description: Grants permission to update an Outpost

UpdateSite.description: Grants permission to update a site

UpdateSiteAddress.description: Grants permission to update the site address

UpdateSiteRackPhysicalProperties.description: Grants permission to update the physical properties of a rack at a site

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
